aboutDesc1: I lead teams in ERP, AI, and full-stack web development, creating intelligent and scalable solutions that connect complex business processes with modern technology.
aboutDesc2: My focus is on driving innovation, improving efficiency, and delivering measurable results for every project. By combining strategic leadership with hands-on expertise, I help organizations turn ambitious ideas into high-performing digital solutions.
aboutDesc3: I am passionate about fostering collaborative, creative teams that embrace cutting-edge tools and methodologies to solve real-world challenges.
aboutFeature1Desc1: Progressed from Frontend Developer → Project Manager → Technical Lead → CTO.
aboutFeature1Desc2: Proven ability to lead engineering teams, define technical architecture, and manage product roadmaps.
aboutFeature1Desc3: Demonstrates strategic thinking in building scalable, enterprise-grade systems.
aboutFeature2Desc1: Deep experience across frontend (React, Angular, Next.js) and backend (Node.js, Python frameworks).
aboutFeature2Desc2: Specializes in ERP systems development, integrating complex enterprise workflows with modern web platforms.
aboutFeature2Desc3: Strong database and API design skills for scalable, reliable applications.
aboutFeature3Desc1: Experienced in incorporating AI into software solutions to automate processes and enhance functionality.
aboutFeature3Desc2: Combines AI, full-stack development, and ERP expertise to create intelligent, business-ready applications.
aboutFeature3Desc3: Demonstrates ability to deliver cutting-edge technology in real-world enterprise contexts.
